title: You know what Eva needs
wikitext:
[]: You know what Eva needs?             Quote Post by Phaze » Wed Dec 08, 2004 7:12 pm A Wiki . With contributing members, I think it could work.

[]:             Quote Post by Hexon.Arq » Wed Dec 08, 2004 7:26 pm I've never heard of a Wookie--er, Wiki, but I'll bet that by the time the fourth person replies to this thread, there will already be one for Eva.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Wed Dec 08, 2004 7:32 pm There have been several Evangelion Wikis in the past. They haven't gone ANYWHERE. Eva + Wiki = NONSENSE

[]:             Quote Post by Dave » Wed Dec 08, 2004 9:37 pm I agree with the Monkey; Wiki's don't work so well on something like Eva, there is just way more opinion than fact.

[]:             Quote Post by Hexon.Arq » Thu Dec 09, 2004 12:17 am Oh, well, there you go. Now, about those Eva Wookies... 8)

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Thu Dec 09, 2004 5:27 pm I so should have named the site Eva Wookie. What do you think? EvaWookie.com! :P

[]:             Quote Post by Hexon.Arq » Thu Dec 09, 2004 6:52 pm I say "LucasOwnedAnimeFansite.com"!

[]:             Quote Post by Kiel » Sun Dec 12, 2004 4:32 pm An Eva wiki, huh? Maybe, but probably not. An Eva wookie however...hmmmm Kensuke: Hey, have you heard? Toji: What? Kensuke: That new transfer student, I heard he's the pilot of that giant robot! Student #4: Is it true that you're the pilot? Eva Wookie: roaaaarrorrraaaaar ! *eats student #4* kensuke: wow, must be great to be a pilot...
